app.title: Introspective Diffusion Language Models
app.author: zagwdt
app.description: Introspective Diffusion is a new method for language models that enables more efficient use of pre-trained models through self-awareness.
proposed_tests: Train on a small dataset and measure inference latency
Compare against a baseline language model with no introspection
Test on various types of text inputs
